title: DrownedOverhaul – A Deep Sea Threat Awaits
description: DrownedOverhaul transforms Minecraft’s oceans into a place of genuine peril. This plugin completely reimagines the behavior of Drowned mobs, turning them from passive nuisances into coordinated threats lurking beneath the waves.
body:
**Features:**

- **Drowned Grab Mechanic:** Drowned mobs can now latch onto nearby players underwater and pull them downward.
- **Multi-Grab Support:** Up to 4 Drowned can grab a single player, with increasing drag force.
- **Configurable Settings:** Includes a config.yml for adjusting:
   - Maximum Drowned per player
   - Grab range
   - Pull strength
   - Cooldowns and delays
- **Failsafe Handling:** Prevents infinite grab loops or buggy behavior when players escape.
- **Lightweight & Server-Friendly:** Optimized for performance on PaperMC 1.21.4.

**Technical Notes:** 
- First stable plugin structure using Maven.
- Plugin auto-loads on server startup, no folder required for setup.
- Uses scheduled tasks for smooth grabbing behavior.
